data.title: New Arkangel Fund SP launched by CV5 Capital in Cayman Islands with an investment strategy led by Arkangel Wealth Management in Dec. 2025.
data.description: In George Town, Cayman Islands, a newly established digital asset hedge fund named Arkangel Fund SP has been introduced through CV5 Capital, a prominent institutional digital asset manager. The fund is managed by Arkangel Wealth Management and operates with a systematic investment approach. This collaboration combines the expertise of Arkangel Wealth Management with the resources and technological capabilities of CV5 Capital. The launch took place on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Australia has 145 existing data centers in major cities with heavy investments, making Sydney, Melbourne, and Canberra key data center hubs in Asia-Pacific.
data.description: A database titled "Australia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Australia is home to approximately 145 existing data centers, with key cities such as Sydney, Melbourne, and Canberra playing a significant role in the country's data center landscape. The market is experiencing substantial investments amounting to billions of dollars, primarily centered in Sydney, Melbourne, and Canberra. This trend is solidifying Australia's status as a leading data center hub in the Asia-Pacific region, with Sydney being a dominant force.

data.title: Global Business Travel Management Solution Market to reach USD 40.28 billion by 2031 from USD 31.14 billion in 2024, growing at a CAGR.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of December 5, 2025, the global market for Business Travel Management Solutions was worth USD 31,140 million in 2024. It is anticipated to expand to USD 40,280 million by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of...

data.title: Cloudastructure wins 2025 MHN Excellence Award for its AI-powered security platform benefiting multifamily housing.
data.description: Cloudastructure's AI-powered security platform has been honored with an award for its transformative impact on multifamily housing. The platform utilizes artificial intelligence technology to enhance security measures in residential properties. This recognition highlights the platform's effectiveness in addressing security challenges in the multifamily housing sector. The award showcases Cloudastructure's commitment to innovation and excellence in providing security solutions. This recognition further solidifies Cloudastructure's position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Imperial Petroleum Inc. in Greece will reveal Q3 and 9M 2025 results on Dec 11, 2025, in NY before market opens.
data.description: A company based in Athens, Greece, Imperial Petroleum Inc., which specializes in ship-owning and providing seaborne transportation services for petroleum products, crude oil, and drybulk, declared that it will disclose its financial and operational performance for the third quarter and nine months ending on September 30, 2025. This information is set to be released before the opening of the market in New York on December 11, 2025.

The Hezbollah leader asserts that his movement supports Beirut's diplomatic approach with Israel.

data.title: Dr. Rini Bavishi of Smiles Management Company is recognized as a top dentist in America's 40 Under 40, focusing on trust in dentistry.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Mansfield, Texas, Dr. Rini Bavishi was recognized for her dedication to dentistry as she was named one of America's Top 40 Under 40 Dentists. She emphasizes the importance of trust and focuses on creating lasting relationships with her patients rather than just achieving picture-perfect smiles. This accolade acknowledges her exceptional skill and commitment to providing top-notch dental care to her patients.

data.title: New data center report for New Zealand: 34 existing, 10 upcoming centers, with Auckland leading with 60% capacity. Market totals 114 MW.
data.description: A new database called "New Zealand Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Auckland is the leading city in the upcoming data center market, with over 60% of the total power capacity in the region. Several facilities are expected to be operational between 2022 and 2025, including Silverdale 1 and Hobsonville 1 (HV1A) by CDC Data Centers. Currently, the operational market in New Zealand totals around 114 MW, with CDC Data Centres being a major player.

data.title: Aethlon Medical announces $3.3 million private placement and warrant inducement.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in San Diego, Aethlon Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEMD), a company specializing in medical therapeutics for cancer and infectious diseases, disclosed entering into a securities purchase agreement. The company is focused on developing innovative products for these critical areas.

data.title: Jed Foundation gets $40M donation from MacKenzie Scott to support mental health in teens and young adults.
data.description: The Jed Foundation (JED) has received an additional unrestricted donation, marking the second such gift since 2022. This latest contribution aims to further JED's mission in aiding emotional well-being and preventing suicide among teenagers and young adults. The donation was made in New York on December 5, 2025. JED is a renowned nonprofit organization dedicated to safeguarding emotional health and reducing suicide rates among youths.

data.title: Unit Corp (OTCQX: UNTC) declares $1.25/share dividend for Q4 2025, payable Dec 26 to shareholders as of Dec 16.
data.description: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for Q4 2025. Shareholders as of December 16, 2025, will receive the dividend on December 26, 2025. The funding for the dividend will come from the Company's cash reserves. Unit Corporation is a publicly traded energy firm involved in oil and natural gas operations.
